# Programs

| Program name | Program ID | Purpose in this project |
|---|---|---|
| SPL Token Program | `TokenkegQfeZyiNwAJbNbGKPFXCWuBvf9Ss623VQ5DA` | Core token operations including mint creation, token minting, transfers, and authority management |
| SPL Token-2022 | `TokenzQdBNbLqP5VEhdkAS6EPFLC1PHnBqCXEpPxuEb` | Used for the Orca position NFT and token extension support |
| Associated Token Account | `ATokenGPvbdGVxr1b2hvZbsiqW5xWH25efTNsLJA8knL` | Creates associated token accounts for wallet holders |
| Metaplex Token Metadata | `metaqbxxUerdq28cj1RbAWkYQm3ybzjb6a8bt518x1s` | Stores the token metadata reference for name, symbol, URI, and image |
| Orca Whirlpool | `whirLbMiicVdio4qvUfM5KAg6Ct8VwpYzGff3uctyCc` | Powers the concentrated liquidity pool used for the FOSS / SOL market |
| System Program | `11111111111111111111111111111111` | Allocates accounts and handles base Solana account creation |
| Compute Budget | `ComputeBudget111111111111111111111111111111` | Sets compute unit parameters in transactions |
| Launchpad (custom) | `HtKnLjomtPrjJwyuQe6HApuEcnb76AUp3oG3nTpnQSAr` | The custom no-code launchpad program used to create the token and run the atomic launch flow |
| Transfer Service | `DeJBGdMFa1uynnnKiwrVioatTuHmNLpyFKnmB5kaFdzQ` | Referenced in the recorded small transfer / airdrop activity |
